_fixture: WF02-F3 — webhook fired for a non-payment change; balance still > 0
_purpose: QBO webhook fires Invoice/Update event for an invoice that still has a non-zero balance (e.g., a memo was edited, the due date was nudged, a line item was changed). WF02 should: fetch the invoice, check Balance, see Balance > 0, fall into the false branch of IF: Balance Zero, loop back to Split In Batches without touching the audit log or Slack.
_preTestSetup: 1. In QBO sandbox: pick an unpaid invoice (Balance > 0). Bill's Windsurf Shop Invoice 1027 ($85, 59-ish days overdue at time of fixture authoring) works.
2. Trigger any non-payment edit on that invoice — e.g., update the memo or change the due date. QBO will deliver an Invoice/Update webhook with the same id.
3. No Supabase setup required — the workflow must skip BEFORE touching ar_audit_log.
